@@ -17,1131 +17,59 @@

-(%0A        %22fmt%22%0A        %22bufio%22%0A        %22os%22%0A        %22strconv%22%0A        %22strings%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A    scanner.Split(bufio.ScanWords)%0A%0A    for scanner.Scan() %7B%0A        totalAlbum, _ := strconv.Atoi(scanner.Text())%0A%0A        scanner.Scan()%0A        possuiQtd, _ := strconv.Atoi(scanner.Text())%0A%0A        frequencia :=  make(map%5Bint%5Dint)%0A        var repetidas %5B%5Dstring%0A%0A        for i := 0; i%3C possuiQtd; i++ %7B%0A            scanner.Scan()%0A            fig, _ := strconv.Atoi(scanner.Text())%0A            frequencia%5Bfig%5D++%0A%0A            if frequencia%5Bfig%5D %3E 1 %7B%0A                repetidas = append(repetidas, strconv.Itoa(fig))%0A            %7D%0A        %7D%0A        var faltando %5B%5Dstring%0A        for i := 1; i %3C= totalAlbum; i++ %7B%0A            if frequencia%5Bi%5D == 0 %7B%0A                faltando = append(faltando, strconv.Itoa(i))%0A            %7D%0A        %7D%0A%0A        imprimirResultado(repetidas)%0A        imprimirResultado(faltando)%0A%0A    %7D%0A%7D%0Afunc imprimirResultado(lista %5B%5Dstring) %7B%0A    if len(lista) == 0 %7B%0A        fmt.Println(%22%5B%5D%22)%0A    %7D else %7B%0A        fmt.Println(%22%5B%25s%5D%5Cn%22, strings.Join(lista, %22 %22))%0A    %7D
+%22fmt%22%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    fmt.Println(%22Hello, World!%22)
